mentions.note: Hurt by beef but value proposition back; works; Argentine beef tariff cut positive; reports Wednesday.

Recaptured value crown via $5 meal deal, McValue platform, Extra Value Meals. Latest quarter: 5.7% global comps (vs. 3.9% expected), 6.8% US comps (vs. 5.4% expected), 10% revenue growth. 2,600 gross openings planned; targeting 50K locations by end 2027. CEO committed to never losing on value. Even up 9% YTD, still a buyer at ~25x forward earnings with 2.2% yield.
Fantastic quarter, down ~$10 today on market weakness. Better QSR risk/reward vs Wendy's.
Reports Thursday; typically surprises upside. Value package very popular; competition less effective. Stock drifting lower—definitely worth buying.
Breaking down at 21x earnings and 2.7% yield; buy on pullback to 3% yield basis; QSR better positioned.
Defensive stable despite beef-cost headwind; 2.6% yield and 21x earnings reasonable valuation. Buy in tranches: 25 at $280, 25 at $270, 25 at $265, 50 at $260 to average down and reduce timing risk.
